title: San Blas Boat Rental Guide: Best Charters and Costs for 2026
html:
Planning a trip to San Blas in Panama? Chartering a boat is the only way to explore the 365 islands. Depart from Carti or Porvenir and spend a day island-hopping; prices start from around 180 EUR for a shared tour. Compare verified options with hire a boat through BoatHire24, a worldwide marketplace for bookings.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in San Blas?

Costs in San Blas vary widely, from 180 EUR for a shared tour to 2,500 EUR per day for a private superyacht. Budget travellers can join a group day tour from Porvenir for around 180 EUR per person. A private half-day with a small motorboat costs from 400 EUR. For a full-day catamaran charter, expect 1,200 EUR. Crewed yachts and flybridge models can exceed 2,000 EUR daily.

  • Shared island tour: from 180 EUR per person
  • Small motorboat half-day: from 400 EUR for up to four guests
  • Catamaran full-day: from 1,200 EUR for up to ten guests
  • Private crewed yacht full-day: from 2,500 EUR including crew and fuel

Where to set off in San Blas

Most charters depart from Carti, Porvenir, or the San Blas archipelago’s main anchorages. Carti is the most common mainland departure point, with a marina and parking. Porvenir has a small airport and a dock. Once on the water, popular stops include Chichime Cays, Coco Bandero Cays, and the island of Waisalatupo. The Holandes Cays offer sheltered anchorages and crystal-clear water.

Which boat to rent

Your choice depends on group size and desired experience; below are the top options available on BoatHire24. For a solo or couples trip, consider this motor yacht, a Prestige 500 which combines speed with luxury.

  1. Motor yacht (flybridge), best for style and range, up to eight guests, from 1,800 EUR per day
  2. Sailing catamaran, best for stability and sunbathing, up to ten guests, from 1,200 EUR per day
  3. RIB or small motorboat, best for fast island hopping, up to six guests, from 400 EUR half-day
  4. Crewed luxury yacht, best for full-service charter, up to twelve guests, from 2,500 EUR per day
  5. Traditional kuna sailing boat, best for authentic experience, up to six guests, from 600 EUR per day

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in San Blas?

Yes, if you charter bareboat you need a valid International Certificate of Competence or equivalent. Most operators include a skipper, so relax and enjoy the views. Rental companies on BoatHire24 confirm exact licence requirements when you book. For safety, the high season runs from December to April, when the trade winds blow from the northeast. A genuine local tip:

Anchor in the lee of an island before midday to avoid the afternoon swell; the Holandes Cays offer the calmest spots in the archipelago.

At a glance

  • Price band: 180 EUR to 2,500 EUR per day
  • Peak months: December to April (northeast trade winds)
  • Typical trip length: half-day (4 hours) to full-day (8 hours)
  • Maximum capacity: up to twelve guests on many yachts
  • Currency: EUR (prices often listed in USD or EUR online)

Questions about boat rental in San Blas

Can I stay overnight on a chartered boat in San Blas?

Yes, multi-day charters are available; you sleep on board or on some islands in basic cabins.

What is included in the rental price?

Most rentals include fuel, water, and snacks, but check the listing for details on meals and alcohol.

Is it safe to sail around the San Blas islands?

Yes, the waters are sheltered and the local Kuna guides are experienced; always check weather forecasts.

How far is the archipelago from Panama City?

Carti is about 50 nautical miles from Panama City, a two hour drive followed by a 15 minute boat ride.

BoatHire24 makes it simple to compare and book your San Blas charter for 2026. Whether you choose a Prestige 500 or a sailing catamaran, you will find verified listings at competitive rates. If you own a boat in San Blas, you can list a boat for free and reach travellers worldwide.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in San Blas and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
